<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/build-catalogs.mjs — do not edit by hand -->

48 upstream Cardano projects mirrored under [`docs/sources/`](https://github.com/easy1staking-com/cardano-dev-skills/tree/main/docs/sources/). Auto-refreshed every Monday at 06:00 UTC by [`refresh-docs.yml`](https://github.com/easy1staking-com/cardano-dev-skills/tree/main/.github/workflows/refresh-docs.yml). The canonical entry for each is [`registry/sources.yaml`](https://github.com/easy1staking-com/cardano-dev-skills/tree/main/registry/sources.yaml).

Sources are grouped by category. Priority (`high` / `medium` / `low`) is shown next to each entry — it reflects the maintainer's judgement of how important the source is to the typical Cardano dev workflow.

## infrastructure

| Source | Priority | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Blockfrost OpenAPI** — [`blockfrost/openapi`](https://github.com/blockfrost/openapi) · [site](https://blockfrost.io) | high | Most popular hosted REST API for Cardano (~25% adoption) |
| **Cardano GraphQL** — [`cardano-foundation/cardano-graphql`](https://github.com/cardano-foundation/cardano-graphql) | medium | Cross-platform typed GraphQL API |
| **Cardano Node Wiki** — [`input-output-hk/cardano-node-wiki`](https://github.com/input-output-hk/cardano-node-wiki) | medium | Node documentation and operational guides |
| **Cardano Wallet** — [`cardano-foundation/cardano-wallet`](https://github.com/cardano-foundation/cardano-wallet) | medium | HTTP REST API for wallet operations (Cardano Foundation) |
| **DB-Sync** — [`IntersectMBO/cardano-db-sync`](https://github.com/IntersectMBO/cardano-db-sync) | low | Official PostgreSQL chain indexer (resource-heavy) |
| **Dolos** — [`txpipe/dolos`](https://github.com/txpipe/dolos) · [site](https://txpipe.github.io/dolos) | medium | Lightweight data node - fraction of full node resources |
| **Koios** — [`cardano-community/koios-artifacts`](https://github.com/cardano-community/koios-artifacts) · [site](https://koios.rest) | medium | Decentralized community REST query layer |
| **Kupo** — [`CardanoSolutions/kupo`](https://github.com/CardanoSolutions/kupo) · [site](https://cardanosolutions.github.io/kupo) | high | Fast, lightweight UTxO chain-index |
| **Mithril** — [`input-output-hk/mithril`](https://github.com/input-output-hk/mithril) · [site](https://mithril.network) | high | Stake-based snapshots for fast node bootstrapping |
| **Ogmios** — [`cardanosolutions/ogmios`](https://github.com/cardanosolutions/ogmios) · [site](https://ogmios.dev) | high | WebSocket bridge for cardano-node with JSON/RPC interface |
| **Oura** — [`txpipe/oura`](https://github.com/txpipe/oura) · [site](https://txpipe.github.io/oura) | medium | Rust pipeline for chain event streaming |
| **Pallas** — [`txpipe/pallas`](https://github.com/txpipe/pallas) | medium | Rust building blocks for Ouroboros/Cardano protocols |
| **Yaci Store** — [`bloxbean/yaci-store`](https://github.com/bloxbean/yaci-store) | medium | Modular Java indexer with Blockfrost-compatible APIs |

## smart-contracts

| Source | Priority | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Aiken** — [`aiken-lang/site`](https://github.com/aiken-lang/site) · [site](https://aiken-lang.org) | high | Most popular smart contract language (~75% adoption), Rust-like syntax |
| **Aiken Design Patterns** — [`Anastasia-Labs/aiken-design-patterns`](https://github.com/Anastasia-Labs/aiken-design-patterns) | high | Best practices and design patterns for Aiken (Anastasia Labs) |
| **Aiken Examples** — [`aiken-lang/aiken`](https://github.com/aiken-lang/aiken) | high | Official Aiken code examples and patterns |
| **Aiken Stdlib** — [`aiken-lang/stdlib`](https://github.com/aiken-lang/stdlib) | high | Aiken standard library - list, option, transaction helpers |
| **Cardano Use Case Templates** — [`cardano-foundation/cardano-template-and-ecosystem-monitoring`](https://github.com/cardano-foundation/cardano-template-and-ecosystem-monitoring) | high | 19 generic blockchain use-case templates implemented across Aiken (on-chain) and Mesh/Evolution/cardano-client-lib (off-chain). Foundation reference set. |
| **CIP-113 Programmable Tokens** — [`cardano-foundation/cip113-programmable-tokens`](https://github.com/cardano-foundation/cip113-programmable-tokens) | medium | Reference implementation for programmable token standard |
| **OpShin** — [`opshin/opshin`](https://github.com/opshin/opshin) | medium | 100% valid Python that compiles to UPLC |
| **Pebble** — [`HarmonicLabs/pebble`](https://github.com/HarmonicLabs/pebble) | medium | Smart contract framework by Harmonic Labs (TypeScript) |
| **Plu-ts** — [`HarmonicLabs/plu-ts`](https://github.com/HarmonicLabs/plu-ts) | medium | TypeScript eDSL for on-chain and off-chain |
| **Plutarch** — [`Plutonomicon/plutarch-plutus`](https://github.com/Plutonomicon/plutarch-plutus) | medium | Typed Haskell eDSL for highly optimized UPLC |
| **Plutus** — [`IntersectMBO/plutus`](https://github.com/IntersectMBO/plutus) | medium | Original Haskell-based smart contract platform by IOG/Intersect |
| **Scalus** — [`scalus3/scalus`](https://github.com/scalus3/scalus) | medium | Scala 3 on-chain and off-chain platform |
| **Smart Contract Vulnerabilities** — [`easy1staking-com/cardano-smart-contract-vulnerabilities`](https://github.com/easy1staking-com/cardano-smart-contract-vulnerabilities) | high | 26 documented eUTxO vulnerability patterns with mitigations |

| **cardano-js-sdk** — [`input-output-hk/cardano-js-sdk`](https://github.com/input-output-hk/cardano-js-sdk) | medium | IOG's comprehensive TypeScript SDK, powers Lace wallet |
| **CIP-113 SDK (TypeScript)** — [`easy1staking-com/cip113-sdk-ts`](https://github.com/easy1staking-com/cip113-sdk-ts) | medium | TypeScript SDK for building applications on top of CIP-113 programmable tokens |
| **Evolution SDK** — [`IntersectMBO/evolution-sdk`](https://github.com/IntersectMBO/evolution-sdk) · [site](https://evolution-sdk.dev) | high | Next-gen Intersect SDK built on Effect library |
| **Evolution SDK Packages** — [`IntersectMBO/evolution-sdk`](https://github.com/IntersectMBO/evolution-sdk) | high | Evolution SDK package-level READMEs |
| **Mesh SDK** — [`MeshJS/meshjs.dev`](https://github.com/MeshJS/meshjs.dev) · [site](https://meshjs.dev) | high | Leading open-source TypeScript SDK - tx builder, wallet connectors, React |
| **Mesh SDK Packages** — [`MeshJS/mesh`](https://github.com/MeshJS/mesh) | medium | Mesh SDK package-level documentation and READMEs |
| **PyCardano** — [`Python-Cardano/pycardano`](https://github.com/Python-Cardano/pycardano) · [site](https://pycardano.readthedocs.io) | medium | Lightweight Python library for transaction building |

## oracles

| Source | Priority | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Charli3 Pull Oracle Client** — [`Charli3-Official/charli3-pull-oracle-client`](https://github.com/Charli3-Official/charli3-pull-oracle-client) | medium | Python consumer SDK for Charli3 pull oracle - request feeds, build aggregation transactions, collect multisig signatures |
| **Charli3 Pull Oracle Contracts** — [`Charli3-Official/charli3-pull-oracle-contracts`](https://github.com/Charli3-Official/charli3-pull-oracle-contracts) | medium | Aiken (Plutus V3) contracts for Charli3's pull-based multisig oracle - minting policy, spending validator, IQR consensus, reward logic |
| **Charli3 Pull Oracle SDK** — [`Charli3-Official/charli3-pull-oracle-sdk`](https://github.com/Charli3-Official/charli3-pull-oracle-sdk) | medium | Python off-chain core for Charli3 ODV oracles - deployment, governance, aggregation, chain queries, datum types |

## standards

| Source | Priority | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Cardano Docs** — [`input-output-hk/cardano-documentation`](https://github.com/input-output-hk/cardano-documentation) · [site](https://docs.cardano.org) | high | Official Cardano documentation at docs.cardano.org |
| **Cardano Ledger** — [`IntersectMBO/cardano-ledger`](https://github.com/IntersectMBO/cardano-ledger) | high | Formal ledger specs - Shelley, Alonzo, Babbage, Conway eras, tx validation, fees |

## Maintenance bar

Every entry must satisfy: last commit < 6 months old; ≥1 release tag or active issue/PR activity in the last 3 months; no archived / deprecated / sunset banner; for forks, the maintained canonical. See [Governance](/cardano-dev-skills/contributing/governance/) for the full policy.
